mapper.sql: id, order_no, item_no, split_no, rorder_no, order_type, model_no, quantity, state_code, state_des, state_date, state_type, create_time, update_time, cust_dlv_date, cust_ship_date, cust_sign_date, dept_dlv_date, po_dlv_date, po_reply_date, po_ship_date, customer_no, user_no, dept_no, supplier_code, supplier_no, act_arrival_date, es_arrival_date, es_arrive_date_req, provider, ship_date, es_ship_date, express_dlv_date, delay_day, po_delay_day, corder_no, cmodel_no, trans_Type, supplier_orderNo, shikomi_no, supplier_rcvtime, order_psn_no, order_appover_no, po_invoice_no, po_exp_type, po_holon, po_no, order_date, Receive_Date, po_date, purchase_type, opt_user_no, opt_user_name, po_rcv_time, inqA, inqB, rcv_status, po_reply_dateA, po_reply_dateB, po_reply_dateC, po_trans_type, warehouse_code, port_arrivedate, customs_date, begin_produce_date, po_price, order_psn_dept, end_user, po_imptime, intercept
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.order_state
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.order_state (id, order_no, item_no, split_no, rorder_no, order_type, model_no, quantity, state_code, state_des, state_date, state_type, create_time, update_time, es_arrive_date_req, provider, ship_date, es_ship_date, express_dlv_date, delay_day, po_delay_day, corder_no, cmodel_no, trans_Type, supplier_orderNo, shikomi_no, supplier_rcvtime, order_psn_no, #{poReplyDatec,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{poTransType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{portArrivedate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{customsDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update dbo.order_state
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
item_no = #{record.itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
split_no = #{record.splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
rorder_no = #{record.rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_type = #{record.orderType,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
state_code = #{record.stateCode,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
state_des = #{record.stateDes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
state_date = #{record.stateDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
state_type = #{record.stateType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
cust_dlv_date = #{record.custDlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
cust_ship_date = #{record.custShipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
cust_sign_date = #{record.custSignDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
dept_dlv_date = #{record.deptDlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
po_dlv_date = #{record.poDlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
po_reply_date = #{record.poReplyDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
po_ship_date = #{record.poShipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_no = #{record.userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_no = #{record.deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_code = #{record.supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_no = #{record.supplierNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
act_arrival_date = #{record.actArrivalDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
es_arrival_date = #{record.esArrivalDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
es_arrive_date_req = #{record.esArriveDateReq,jdbcType=DATE},
provider = #{record.provider,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ship_date = #{record.shipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
es_ship_date = #{record.esShipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
express_dlv_date = #{record.expressDlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delay_day = #{record.delayDay,jdbcType=INTEGER},
po_delay_day = #{record.poDelayDay,jdbcType=INTEGER},
corder_no = #{record.corderNo,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
cmodel_no = #{record.cmodelNo,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
trans_Type = #{record.transType,jdbcType=CHAR},
supplier_orderNo = #{record.supplierOrderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
shikomi_no = #{record.shikomiNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_rcvtime = #{record.supplierRcvtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
order_psn_no = #{record.orderPsnNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_appover_no = #{record.orderAppoverNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
po_invoice_no = #{record.poInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
po_exp_type = #{record.poExpType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
po_holon = #{record.poHolon,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
po_no = #{record.poNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_date = #{record.orderDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Receive_Date = #{record.receiveDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
po_date = #{record.poDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
purchase_type = #{record.purchaseType,jdbcType=CHAR},
opt_user_no = #{record.optUserNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
opt_user_name = #{record.optUserName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
po_rcv_time = #{record.poRcvTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
inqA = #{record.inqa,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inqB = #{record.inqb,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rcv_status = #{record.rcvStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
po_reply_dateA = #{record.poReplyDatea,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
po_reply_dateB = #{record.poReplyDateb,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
po_reply_dateC = #{record.poReplyDatec,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
po_trans_type = #{record.poTransType,jdbcType=CHAR},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
port_arrivedate = #{record.portArrivedate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
customs_date = #{record.customsDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
begin_produce_date = #{record.beginProduceDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
po_price = #{record.poPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
order_psn_dept = #{record.orderPsnDept,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
end_user = #{record.endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
po_imptime = #{record.poImptime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
intercept = #{record.intercept,jdbcType=BIT},

update dbo.order_state set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, item_no = #{record.itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, split_no = #{record.splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, opt_user_no = #{record.optUserNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, opt_user_name = #{record.optUserName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, po_rcv_time = #{record.poRcvTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, inqA = po_imptime = #{record.poImptime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, intercept = #{record.intercept,jdbcType=BIT}

update dbo.order_state
order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
item_no = #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
split_no = #{splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
rorder_no = #{rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_type = #{orderType,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
state_code = #{stateCode,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
state_des = #{stateDes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
state_date = #{stateDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
state_type = #{stateType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
cust_dlv_date = #{custDlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
cust_ship_date = #{custShipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
cust_sign_date = #{custSignDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
dept_dlv_date = #{deptDlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
po_dlv_date = #{poDlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
po_reply_date = #{poReplyDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
po_ship_date = #{poShipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_no = #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_no = #{deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_code = #{supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_no = #{supplierNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
act_arrival_date = #{actArrivalDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
es_arrival_date = #{esArrivalDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
es_arrive_date_req = #{esArriveDateReq,jdbcType=DATE},
provider = #{provider,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ship_date = #{shipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
es_ship_date = #{esShipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
express_dlv_date = #{expressDlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delay_day = #{delayDay,jdbcType=INTEGER},
po_delay_day = #{poDelayDay,jdbcType=INTEGER},
corder_no = #{corderNo,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
cmodel_no = #{cmodelNo,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
trans_Type = #{transType,jdbcType=CHAR},
supplier_orderNo = #{supplierOrderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
shikomi_no = #{shikomiNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_rcvtime = #{supplierRcvtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
order_psn_no = #{orderPsnNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_appover_no = #{orderAppoverNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
po_invoice_no = #{poInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
po_exp_type = #{poExpType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
po_holon = #{poHolon,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
po_no = #{poNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_date = #{orderDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Receive_Date = #{receiveDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
po_date = #{poDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
purchase_type = #{purchaseType,jdbcType=CHAR},
opt_user_no = #{optUserNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
opt_user_name = #{optUserName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
po_rcv_time = #{poRcvTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
inqA = #{inqa,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inqB = #{inqb,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rcv_status = #{rcvStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
po_reply_dateA = #{poReplyDatea,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
po_reply_dateB = #{poReplyDateb,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
po_reply_dateC = #{poReplyDatec,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
po_trans_type = #{poTransType,jdbcType=CHAR},
warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
port_arrivedate = #{portArrivedate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
customs_date = #{customsDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
begin_produce_date = #{beginProduceDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
po_price = #{poPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
order_psn_dept = #{orderPsnDept,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
end_user = #{endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
po_imptime = #{poImptime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
intercept = #{intercept,jdbcType=BIT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.order_state set order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, item_no = #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, split_no = #{splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, rorder_no = #{rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_type = #{purchaseType,jdbcType=CHAR}, opt_user_no = #{optUserNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, opt_user_name = #{optUserName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, po_rcv_time = #{poRcvTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, inqA = #{inqa,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inqB = #{inqb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rcv_status = #{rcvStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, po_reply_dateA = #{poReplyDatea,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, po_reply_dateB = #{poReplyDateb,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, po_reply_dateC = #{poReplyDatec,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, po_trans_type = #{poTransType,jdbcType=CHAR}, warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, port_arrivedate = #{portArrivedate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, customs_date = #{customsDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, begin_produce_date = #{beginProduceDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, po_price = #{poPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, order_psn_dept = #{orderPsnDept,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, end_user = #{endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, po_imptime = #{poImptime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, intercept = #{intercept,jdbcType=BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
